title: Precompiler Directives: Descriptions
breadcrumbs: ProcScript: Precompiler Directives and Uniface Constants
text: Precompiler Directives: Descriptions Precompiler directives are symbols used in ProcScript that are parsed and interpreted by the precompiler to insert or generate constants, IncludeScripts , and other code. For more information, see Precompiler Directives . Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
